mapper.select:
SELECT i.*, u.name as userName FROM smart_finance.invoice i LEFT JOIN smart_finance.sys_user u ON i.user_id = u.id
AND i.invoice_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{invoiceCode}, '%')
AND i.drawer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{drawer}, '%')
AND i.verify_status = #{verifyStatus}
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
ORDER BY i.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM smart_finance.invoice i LEFT JOIN smart_finance.sys_user u ON i.user_id = u.id
AND i.invoice_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{invoiceCode}, '%')
AND i.drawer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{drawer}, '%')
AND i.verify_status = #{verifyStatus}
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
